example_response.uncertainty_notice: This probability estimate reflects model uncertainty, not ground truth. Images labeled as 'real_unverified' in training data were not proven to be non-synthetic. High confidence does not guarantee correctness.

can_do: Estimate probability that an image is AI-generated (synthetic)
Provide confidence intervals for probability estimates
Detect StyleGAN-generated face images with moderate accuracy
Process JPEG, PNG, and WebP images up to 10MB
cannot_do: Prove an image is authentic or human-made
Detect all types of AI-generated images
known_limitations: Model trained on single StyleGAN dataset only
REAL training images were unverified - authenticity unknown
Hand-crafted features may miss generator-specific artifacts
Calibration valid only within training distribution
Performance varies by image resolution and compression
Augmented images may produce unexpected results
response.intended_use: This API provides probability estimates for research and informational purposes. It should NOT be used as sole evidence for legal, journalistic, or high-stakes decisions. Always combine with human review and additional verification methods.
